query:
-- Get all distinct contact names in Xero billing items to find Aus Ships variant
SELECT DISTINCT contactName, COUNT(*) as items, SUM(lineAmount) as revenue
FROM billing_items
WHERE (billingPlatform = '' OR billingPlatform IS NULL)
  AND contactName LIKE '%Au%'
GROUP BY contactName
ORDER BY contactName
LIMIT 20;
